title: Fishy's Enchantment Table
body:
Adds a cool circle thing to the enchantment table.

it's animated, and works without mods

![purp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e97632bcc548a2a8bf1ce4a20f6aeda4fa9b0e5.png)

If you have mods however, you can access other tables via respackopts.

![pent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c091487af4fb6490b9920b94806e91d6e9c6293.png)

[![Affiliate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a4883838950998d67143440012948c2410ff03.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3131)
